flow-definition.description: Advanced Firecracker matrix for lpf e2e routing, traffic shaping, nftables, logging, and conntrack coverage. Requested kernels are never counted as covered unless a real Firecracker image runs them.

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: EXPECTED_COMMIT
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: Short or full lpf commit expected in the source archive.

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: KERNEL_MATRIX_FILE
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: Tracked TSV manifest inside the source archive. Used when REQUESTED_KERNELS and AVAILABLE_KERNELS are empty.

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: REQUESTED_KERNELS
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: Optional comma-separated label override. Empty means read requested labels from KERNEL_MATRIX_FILE.

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: AVAILABLE_KERNELS
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: Optional comma-separated label=image override. Empty means read available images from KERNEL_MATRIX_FILE.

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: SCENARIO_COUNT
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: Number of lpf e2e scenarios to run per available kernel. Advanced jobs require 500-1000.

hudson.model.BooleanParameterDefinition.name: REQUIRE_ALL_KERNELS
hudson.model.BooleanParameterDefinition.description: Fail the build when any requested kernel label is missing from AVAILABLE_KERNELS.

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: SOURCE_ARCHIVE_BASE_URL
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: Optional archive base URL. Defaults to the Firecracker guest default gateway on port 18081.

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: CONTROLLER_SOURCE_ARCHIVE_BASE_URL
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: Optional controller-only archive base URL for the inventory stage. Empty falls back to SOURCE_ARCHIVE_BASE_URL and then controller-local defaults.
